message:
Add observation and failure fanout endpoints, extract resolveClient

Extract shared resolveClient helper to DRY up client resolution across
fanout routes. Add POST /fanout/:id/observations (reads result.json,
promotes observations to story cards) and POST /fanout/:id/failure
(generates follow-up cards from failed runs).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
